overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a high-rise balcony in a cyberpunk metropolis at night, overlooking rain-soaked neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring cinematic quality, atmospheric rainfall, and a cool blue-green color palette punctuated by vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise balcony overlooking neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on a balcony, observing the rainy cyberpunk cityscape and neon-lit skyline

entered.detail: dark metal railing with horizontal bars in the immediate foreground
tall futuristic towers with vertical neon strips and illuminated windows against the night sky
large circular red neon sign glowing on a distant building facade
tall building covered in large holographic advertisements and digital displays
modern glass building with geometric illuminated patterns on its facade

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady first-person perspective from a high-rise balcony overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. Rain falls steadily over the neon-lit skyline, with holographic advertisements and illuminated skyscrapers dominating the view. The metal balcony railing frames the foreground while the distant towers glow with blue, red, and yellow neon light against the dark rainy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a high-rise balcony, capturing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape immersed in a rainy night. It begins with a view framed by a metal balcony railing, looking out over a dense skyline of illuminated skyscrapers. As the camera lingers, the steady rainfall blurs the distant towers, which glow with vibrant blue, red, and yellow neon lights. The scene remains fixed on this atmospheric vista, where holographic advertisements pierce through the dark, rainy air to define the futuristic urban horizon.
